---
title: "Desktop"
description: "Build a desktop-oriented sandbox with XFCE and noVNC."
---

# Desktop

This template builds a sandbox with an Ubuntu desktop environment, a virtual display, and a noVNC bridge on port `6080`.

This repository does not expose desktop-control primitives directly; the template is the runtime foundation you can pair with your own automation tools. See [Computer Use](/docs/use-cases/computer-use) for orchestration guidance.

## Template definition

```go
package main

import e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"

var template = e2b.Template(nil).
	FromUbuntuImage("22.04").
	RunCmd([]string{
		"yes | unminimize",
		"apt-get update",
		"DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y xvfb xfce4 xfce4-goodies x11vnc curl git wget net-tools xdotool scrot",
		"git clone --branch e2b-desktop https://github.com/e2b-dev/noVNC.git /opt/noVNC",
		"ln -s /opt/noVNC/vnc.html /opt/noVNC/index.html",
		"git clone --branch v0.12.0 https://github.com/novnc/websockify /opt/noVNC/utils/websockify",
		"apt-get clean",
		"rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*",
	}, &struct{ User string }{User: "root"}).
	Copy("start_command.sh", "/start_command.sh", nil).
	RunCmd("chmod +x /start_command.sh", &struct{ User string }{User: "root"}).
	SetStartCmd("/start_command.sh", e2b.WaitForPort(6080))
```

## Startup script

```bash
#!/bin/bash

export DISPLAY=${DISPLAY:-:0}

Xvfb $DISPLAY -ac -screen 0 1280x800x24 -nolisten tcp &
sleep 2

startxfce4 &
sleep 5

x11vnc -bg -display $DISPLAY -forever -shared -rfbport 5900 -nopw &
sleep 2

cd /opt/noVNC/utils && ./novnc_proxy --vnc localhost:5900 --listen 6080 --web /opt/noVNC &
sleep 2
```

## Build

```go
package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"

	e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"
)

func main() {
	buildInfo, err := e2b.Build(context.Background(), template, "desktop", &e2b.BuildOptions{
		BasicBuildOptions: e2b.BasicBuildOptions{
			CpuCount:    8,
			MemoryMB:    8192,
			OnBuildLogs: e2b.DefaultBuildLogger(),
		},
	})
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	log.Println(buildInfo.TemplateID)
}
```

## Create a sandbox and open the desktop

```go
package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"

	e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"
)

func main() {
	sandbox, err := e2b.Create(context.Background(), "desktop", nil)
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer sandbox.Kill(context.Background(), nil)

	log.Println("Desktop URL:", "https://"+sandbox.GetHost(6080))
}
```
